pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script writing the SOP file to this path.
setup_task.sh SOP document and export_result.sh script.
export_result.sh script saving the result file.
setup_task.sh SOP document text ('Command a TAKEOFF to exactly 25 meters altitude.').
setup_task.sh SOP document text ('Observe the telemetry (HUD) for 15-20 seconds').

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated QGroundControl flight simulation scenario. The SOP document path, report path, and result file path explicitly match the bash setup and export scripts. The target altitude of 25 meters and minimum flight/observation time of 15 seconds are explicitly mandated within the dynamically generated SOP text in setup_task.sh.
